news.summary: AB DAO has recently revealed a new dual reward campaign in partnership with Bitget, the world's second-largest digital asset trading platform. The campaign is in honor of AB's Token Generation Event (TGE) and marks an exciting collaboration between the two entities.
news.headline: AB DAO and Bitget team up for dual reward campaign, giving out $2.6M worth of $AB globally.

news.summary: Seychelles-based cryptocurrency exchange OKX is reentering the US market with former Barclays director Roshan Robert as its US CEO. The exchange will migrate existing Okcoin users to the new platform, promising improvements like deeper liquidity, lower fees, and advanced trading tools. The rollout will be phased, with a nationwide launch planned for 2025. OKX will integrate with local banks and support major assets like Bitcoin, Ether, USDt, and USDC. The exchange also plans to launch OKX Wallet for US customers, supporting 130 blockchains and a DEX aggregator. OKX recently faced a federal probe resulting in a $505 million fine; former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo was hired to advise on compliance. OKX aims to become the compliance gold standard globally.
news.headline: OKX returns to US with $505M DOJ settlement, appoints Roshan Robert as US CEO, promises improvements in liquidity and fees.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.7%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The strong job market added 250,000 new jobs last month, surpassing economists' expectations. This surge in employment has led to a total of 2.5 million new jobs created in the past year. The report also highlights that the labor force participation rate has increased to 62.3%, showing more individuals are actively seeking employment. Moreover, average hourly earnings have seen a 2.7% increase, indicating growth in wages for workers. Overall, the data portrays a robust and thriving job market with promising indicators for continued economic growth.
news.headline: Singapore PM cautions about bumpy shifts amid US retreat.

news.summary: Celebrating its 75th anniversary, ASKO, a premium Scandinavian brand specializing in kitchen, laundry, and professional appliances, marks a milestone in innovation. The company unveiled an interactive exhibition at Milan Design Week running from April 8 to 13, commemorating its journey since introducing the first washing machine. This event coincides with the launch of unique products in the market, showcasing ASKO's commitment to excellence in the industry.
news.headline: ASKO brand commemorates 75 years of Scandinavian innovation at Milan Design Week through an interactive exhibition.

news.summary: In the latest announcement, it was revealed that the economy experienced a 6% growth in the last quarter, surpassing all previous estimates. The unemployment rate simultaneously dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in a decade. In addition, the stock market saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 800 points. Experts attribute this positive trend to increased consumer spending and booming export figures. These developments are seen as a promising sign for the country's economic recovery after a challenging period.
news.headline: Georgetown extends Qatar contract amidst Trump's clash with universities.

news.summary: The latest data reveals that the global economy is projected to expand at a rate of 4.4% in 2022, showing signs of recovery after a 3.6% growth in 2021. Advanced economies are anticipated to grow by 3.1% this year, while emerging and developing economies are expected to see a growth of around 5.5%. Inflation rates are predicted to remain elevated in 2022, with advanced economies experiencing a 3.7% increase and emerging markets facing a 6.5% rise. Global debt levels have soared to a record high of $226 trillion, with government debt reaching 105% of GDP for advanced economies and 60% for emerging markets. These numbers reflect the ongoing challenges and disparities in the global economic landscape.
news.headline: ASML's orders fall below projections, CEO raises concerns over tariff volatility.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, marking a decrease of 0.5% from the previous month. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs, surpassing expectations and showing strong growth. This positive trend has been attributed to various factors, including increased consumer confidence and a rise in spending. Analysts predict that if this momentum continues, the economy could see further improvements in the coming months. The stock market also responded positively to this news, with major indices reaching new highs. Overall, these developments indicate a promising outlook for the country's economic landscape.
news.headline: Pakistan considering increasing purchase of cotton and soybean as a goodwill gesture towards US.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 7.2%, demonstrating a significant increase from the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals has now risen to 12.3 million, marking a sharp uptick of 1.2 million people seeking employment. This surge in unemployment has been attributed to the ongoing economic downturn and the struggles faced by various industries due to the global pandemic. Despite government efforts to stimulate the job market, challenges persist in restoring stability and growth. The latest figures highlight the urgent need for comprehensive strategies to address the rising unemployment trend and support those impacted in finding sustainable work opportunities.
news.headline: Japanese brokerage firms increasing authentication measures after accounts compromised; significant rise in cyber threats.

news.summary: A recent report states that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The report also revealed that over 300,000 new jobs were created last month, contributing to this decline in unemployment. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant increase, with the main index rising by 5% in the last quarter. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators are a result of various government policies and increased consumer spending. The government aims to sustain this trend and further reduce the unemployment rate in the coming months.
news.headline: ECB plans double rate cut due to falling inflation, says Vanguard.
Stock market music king's empire crumbles; losses of millions reported.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Russo’s New York Pizzeria & Italian Kitchen revealed the launch of its latest branch at 4537 S. Power Rd, Mesa, AZ 85212 on Saturday, April 19, 2025. This opening signifies Russo’s debut in Mesa, Arizona, offering residents a taste of genuine New York-style pizza and Italian cuisine. The inauguration commences with a ribbon-cutting event, organized by the Mesa Chamber of Commerce, on Friday, April 18 at 10:30 AM. The public is invited to join in on the festivities and celebrate this new addition to the community.
news.headline: Russo's New York Pizzeria & Italian Kitchen opening in Mesa, AZ at 4537 S. Power Rd on April 19, 2025, first location in Mesa. Ribbon-cutting on April 18 at 10:30 AM.

news.summary: Companies are facing challenges in allocating hundreds of billions of dollars in marketing budgets as they grapple with uncertainty. The timing is particularly difficult for certain sectors that are experiencing financial difficulties.
news.headline: Confusion over tariffs and recession fears paralyze advertisers as hundreds of billions in marketing funds remain undecided. Timing is critical for some industries.

news.summary: In Bloomington, Minnesota, Polar Semiconductor, the sole U.S.-owned merchant foundry focusing on sensor, power, and high-voltage semiconductors, has revealed a strategic partnership with Renesas Electronics Corporation. Under this deal, Polar will license their Gallium Nitride on Silicon D-Mode (GaN-on-Si) technology to Renesas. Polar will manufacture High Voltage 650V Class GaN-on-Si devices for Renesas and additional clients at its 200mm automotive quality fab.
news.headline: Polar signs deal with Renesas to license GaN-on-Si tech, fabricate 650V GaN-on-Si devices on 200mm wafers.

news.summary: Semler Scientific Inc., a healthcare technology company listed as (NASDAQ: SMLR), revealed their recent securities offering on Tuesday to boost their growing Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) reserves. The company proposed a $500 million offering of various securities, such as debt securities, common stock, units, and warrants, in a Form S-3 registration statement filed with the SEC. Semler plans to utilize the net proceeds from this offering primarily for general corporate purposes, which includes acquiring more Bitcoin. Since adopting Bitcoin as its main treasury reserve asset in May 2024, Semler has been funding its Bitcoin purchases through actions like equity and debt financing, along with cash flow from operations. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Semler Scientific plans $500M securities offer to enhance Bitcoin holdings amid unrealized losses.

news.summary: Sagard has recently formed a key alliance with a secondaries platform, leading to the enhancement of its private equity offerings and widening its international investment reach. The collaboration signifies Sagard's transition into a comprehensive private equity solutions provider. The firm boasts over US$27 billion in assets under its management, establishing its position as a heavyweight in the global alternative asset management sector. The partnership was solidified on April 16, 2025, with operations spanning across Montreal and Nice, France.
news.headline: Sagard partners with BEX Capital to bolster private equity secondaries offering, reaching over $27B in assets.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Drofa Comms, a top PR agency specializing in finance and fintech, announced their participation at TOKEN2049 in Dubai from April 30 to May 1, 2025. The event will be held at Madinat Jumeirah resort and anticipates a gathering of more than...
news.headline: Drofa Comms to attend TOKEN2049 in Dubai from April 30 to May 1, 2025 at Madinat Jumeirah resort, expecting over 2000 attendees.

news.summary: The construction of the Grand Egyptian Museum, located outside Cairo, has been postponed multiple times due to various obstacles including revolutions, wars, financial crises, and the recent pandemic. Despite these challenges, the museum is finally set to open its doors. This long-awaited project boasts impressive numbers, with an estimated cost of over $1 billion and a total area of approximately 50 hectares. The museum will showcase a vast collection of ancient Egyptian artifacts, providing visitors with a unique glimpse into the country's rich history and cultural heritage.
news.headline: Grand Egyptian Museum open near Cairo after delays due to revolutions, wars, crises. Finally open to public.

news.summary: Today, CURRENC Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR) revealed its financial performance for the year ending on December 31, 2024. The Singapore-based fintech company specializes in providing AI solutions to financial institutions globally.
news.headline: CURRENC Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR) reported 2024 full-year financial results in Singapore on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: Sony Block Solutions Labs' layer-2 blockchain network, Soneium, has significantly reduced its blockchain finality time by over 98%, aiming to address scalability challenges. Astar, a Japanese Web3 adoption collective in partnership with AltLayer and EigenLayer, has launched a "Fast Finality Layer" for Sony's L2 blockchain. This achievement brings Soneium to sub-10-second transaction finality, down from the initial 15-minute delay, enhancing DeFi applications and user experience. The new validator network is backed by restaked ETH and Astar tokens. This development is crucial for secure, high-speed crosschain interoperability, improving user trust and developer experience. Faster finality times are vital for advancing decentralized finance and mainstream Web3 adoption, facilitating real-time transactions and interactive applications. Other L2 networks like Arbitrum One offer one-minute finality, highlighting the industry trend towards faster transaction settlement. EigenLayer and AltLayer aim to bridge Ethereum's security with near-instant finality to propel blockchain technology towards widespread adoption. As the collaboration progresses, the expectation is for improved blockchain technology to fuel mainstream crypto adoption and revolutionize the user experience.
news.headline: Sony’s Soneium partners with EigenLayer to achieve <10-second blockchain finality, aiming to enhance scalability and adoption.

news.summary: A technology company based in Shenzhen, China, Aurora Mobile Limited (NASDAQ: JG) has unveiled the Hong Kong version of its verification service, JVerification, aimed at developers seeking secure cross-border services. Released to meet the increasing need for efficient and secure verification solutions in the rapidly evolving digital landscape, JVerification (HK) is designed to facilitate businesses looking to venture into the Hong Kong market. This move comes as part of Aurora Mobile's commitment to providing innovative customer engagement and marketing technology services.
news.headline: Aurora Mobile launches JVerification (HK) for cross-border verification, enhancing developer services in Hong Kong.

news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles on April 16, 2025, Bitget, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange and Web3 firm, unveiled the inclusion of Gomble (GM) for spot trading, alongside the introduction of a unique Launchpool rewards initiative. The spot trading activity for Gomble officially commenced on April 16, 2025, at 10:30 am.
news.headline: Bitget is introducing GOMBLE (GM) with 15M tokens in rewards, starting spot trading on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: Parkland Corporation's President & CEO, Bob Espey, has revealed his intention to resign, with Michael Jennings, Chair of the Board, taking over as Executive Chair. In the midst of macroeconomic and regulatory instability, the company has disclosed its preliminary results for the first quarter of 2025. The announcement was made in Calgary, Alberta, on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: Parkland CEO steps down, chair takes over, Q1 2025 results revealed amidst volatility. April 16, 2025.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Guangzhou, the 134th Canton Fair commenced, attracting a diverse group of international buyers and exhibitors from various sectors. Among them, Haier Small Domestic Appliances garnered attention with its innovative AI-focused concept, "Care for Your Loves with AI".
news.headline: 134th Canton Fair in Guangzhou showcases Haier's AI-driven Small Domestic Appliances emphasizing "Care for Your Loves with AI".
BoJ to cut growth forecast as US tariffs hit.
BoJ to cut growth forecast at April 30 - May 1 meeting.

news.summary: Huasun Energy, a top player in high-efficiency heterojunction (HJT) solar technology, has introduced the Kunlun Series HJT solar modules in XUANCHENG, China on April 16, 2025. These cutting-edge modules boast nearly 100% bifaciality and are specially crafted for vertical photovoltaic (PV) installations. The company is set to revolutionize the solar industry with this breakthrough product.
news.headline: Huasun Energy introduces Kunlun Series HJT modules with up to 100% bifaciality for vertical PV, boosting power efficiency.

news.summary: Registration has officially opened for the inaugural M360 Eurasia event in Tashkent, Uzbekistan on May 21-22, 2025. The GSMA has released a report on the effects of taxation on digital growth to coincide with the upcoming event.
news.headline: GSMA M360 Eurasia 2025 in Tashkent, Uzbekistan on May 21-22, 2025, covers impact of taxation on digital expansion.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Beijing, a report from China.org.cn discussed the changing approaches to public engagement in China. The report highlighted the use of new platforms and participatory tools to listen to and address the needs of the people. This shift towards greater citizen involvement demonstrates a commitment to inclusive governance and responsiveness to public concerns. It signifies a move towards a more interactive and collaborative decision-making process that aims to better serve the populace.
news.headline: China.org.cn reports on evolving strategies for public engagement in China, emphasizing listening and responding to people's needs.

news.summary: Following the setback of Oklahoma's Bitcoin reserve legislation, three states have emerged as frontrunners in the movement to establish state-level BTC reserves. New Hampshire, Texas, and Arizona are spearheading these efforts, with significant momentum building in their respective legislative bodies. This development comes amidst a growing trend towards institutional adoption of cryptocurrencies, with bitcoin standing out as a preferred choice. The potential impact of these initiatives on the broader cryptocurrency market remains to be seen, as more states consider similar measures to diversify their financial assets.
news.headline: Oklahoma Senate committee rejects Bitcoin reserve proposal. New Hampshire, Texas, Arizona take the lead in state BTC reserves.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 10.5%, affecting approximately 15 million people. This increase is primarily attributed to the economic downturn caused by the global pandemic. The government has announced plans to implement new job creation programs to address the growing issue of unemployment. Additionally, the report highlights that the youth unemployment rate has also surged to 24.7%, indicating the need for targeted initiatives to support younger workers in the labor market. Experts predict that it may take several years for the economy to fully recover from the impact of the pandemic on employment.
news.headline: Japanese brokerages to enhance authentication measures following hack of multiple accounts.

news.summary: ASML Holding NV (NASDAQ: ASML) announced better-than-expected first-quarter earnings with revenue reaching €7.742 billion ($8.764 billion), surpassing analyst predictions by 12.94%. The company also reported earnings per share of €6 ($6.83), beating estimates by 18.58%. Sequentially, revenue saw a 16.75% decrease from the fourth quarter, while earnings per share declined by 12.41%. The gross profit for the quarter stood at €4.180 billion ($4.757 billion), down 12.73% from the previous quarter. ASML, a Dutch lithography equipment supplier for Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA), highlighted a gross margin of 54.0%, exceeding expectations due to a favorable EUV product mix. The company's first-quarter total net sales aligned with guidance. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: ASML Holding NV beats revenue, EPS estimates; revenue of $8.764B (12.94% above est) & EPS of $6.83 (18.58% above est). Gross profit at $4.757B. CEO credits performance milestones.

news.summary: Recordati announced that the FDA has approved an expanded indication for Isturisa® (osilodrostat) for the treatment of endogenous hypercortisolemia in patients with Cushing’s syndrome. This approval marks an important milestone for patients with this condition. Isturisa® has shown efficacy in reducing cortisol levels and improving symptoms in this patient population. This decision by the FDA allows for more patients with Cushing’s syndrome to benefit from the treatment with Isturisa®. This expanded indication is expected to have a significant impact on the management of the disease, potentially improving the quality of life for a greater number of patients.
news.headline: FDA approves expanded use of Isturisa for Cushing's syndrome patients. Treats endogenous hypercortisolemia.

news.summary: The global Extra Virgin Avocado Oil Market is experiencing significant growth, with a value of approximately USD 589.12 million in 2024, expected to reach USD 603 million in 2025, and projected to reach around USD 971.13 million by 2034 at a CAGR of about 5.13%. This oil is popular in various industries such as food & beverages, cosmetics & personal care, and pharmaceuticals due to its nutrient density and adaptability. Challenges like supply chain issues due to limited production areas in regions like Mexico and California are causing production costs to rise. However, efforts towards sustainable farming and efficient supply chain solutions are being made to maintain supply. The oil's role in cosmetics and personal care is growing rapidly, attributed to its moisturizing and regenerative properties. The market is segmented by distribution channel, with supermarkets/hypermarkets being the major channel. The Asia-Pacific region is seeing unprecedented demand for extra virgin avocado oil due to urbanization, rising incomes, and health awareness trends, making it a high-end and sought-after product.
news.headline: Global Extra Virgin Avocado Oil Market projected to reach USD 971.13 Million by 2034 at a 5.13% CAGR. Booming due to health benefits and growth in food, beauty, and personal care applications. Supply chain challenges pose potential limitations. Preferred distribution channels: online stores, specialty stores, supermarkets/hypermarkets. Asia-Pacific region shows significant demand growth. Market valued at USD 603 Million in 2025.

The company, listed as YUMC on the NYSE and 9987 on the HKEX, shared the details. This news highlights Yum China's commitment to following regulations and standards set by the HKEX.

This new injection brings the total amount raised in their Series A round to £5.6 million. The noteworthy increase in funding underscores the company's appeal to investors and its potential for growth in the healthcare technology sector.
news.headline: Healthera raises £2 million to boost digital pharmacy growth and expand to North America, totaling £5.6 million funding.

news.summary: In 2024, Shanghai Electric (SEHK:2727, SSE:601727) experienced overall growth in key financial indicators. The company's revenue reached RMB 116.19 billion, showcasing a significant increase. Alongside this, the gross margin also saw growth, reflecting the company's efficiency in managing costs. Additionally, the order volume surged, indicating a strong demand for Shanghai Electric's products and services. The company's cash flow demonstrated improvement as well, showcasing its ability to generate and manage funds effectively. This impressive performance was attributed to Shanghai Electric's expertise in nuclear power and wind power industries, highlighting its core competencies in these sectors.
news.headline: Shanghai Electric sees continued growth in 2024: Revenue at RMB 116.19 billion with growth in gross margin, order volume, and cash flow.

news.summary: In Södertälje, Sweden on April 16, 2025, Scania introduced a new chassis variant equipped with the latest e-machine and charging capabilities. This innovation, along with new rear axle options, offers bus operators a compelling solution for electrifying transportation operations. The new offering showcases Scania's commitment to sustainable transport solutions, addressing the growing need for environmentally friendly alternatives. This move positions Scania as a leader in the industry, catering to the increasing demand for electric vehicles.
news.headline: Scania in Sweden adds three-axle low-entry e-bus variant with new e-machine, charging options, and rear axle options.

news.summary: Gold is outperforming Bitcoin as a safe haven in 2025, with gold fund inflows hitting a record $80 billion year-to-date, double the previous high set in 2020. Gold prices have rallied 22% year-to-date, reaching all-time highs, while Bitcoin is facing challenges with ETFs experiencing a decrease in assets under management from $106 billion to $92 billion. Despite gold's current success, market commentators predict a potential end to its rapid advancement. This may create an opportunity for Bitcoin to catch up, as it tends to follow gold trends with a delay of several months, often experiencing higher volatility. Anthony Pompliano suggests that Bitcoin may run much harder than gold after a delay. It is important to note that this article does not provide investment advice and readers should conduct their own research before making decisions.
news.headline: Gold nears new $3.3K peak, sees record $80B fund inflows. Bitcoin struggles as gold shines in market volatility.

news.summary: In London, Lloyd's has made an investment in BreachBits to assist cyber carriers and brokers in enhancing their risk writing process. This collaboration comes after a successful co-development initiative at Lloyd's Lab.
news.headline: Lloyd's invests in BreachBits to boost cyber insurance performance in Lloyd’s Market post successful co-development project in Lloyd's Lab.
